title: Yosys error message does not provide information about the location of the error.

features.name: always block with multiple posedge sensitivities and unconditional assignment
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered by multiple edge-sensitive events (e.g., posedge clock and posedge reset) where the driven signal is assigned unconditionally without a reset conditional branch, triggering synthesis tools that do not support multiple edge-sensitive events
